arts.ttl: £50m Dean Huijsen holds talks with Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool, Newcastle and Spurs
arts.sum: Representatives of Premier League giants Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool, Newcastle, and Tottenham all met with Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen in the last week, per David Ornstein of The Athletic. Huijsen has a £50m release clause and is also courted by Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: 'Fantastic': Dries Mertens says £50m striker Arsenal want to sign is 'one of the top three strikers in the world'
arts.sum: Arsenal have a big summer ahead of them as Mikel Arteta looks to strengthen his ranks further. The Gunners have had a solid season so...

arts.ttl: Four Real Madrid stars spoke in dressing room after Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Real Madrid suffered an unusually chastening defeat in the Champions League on Tuesday night against Arsenal, losing 3-0 to two Declan Rice strikes complemented by a third fine finish from Mikel Merino. While Los Blancos have suffered heavy defeats in Europe previously, rarely have they been so heavy in the first leg, leaving them with […] The post Four Real Madrid stars spoke in dressing room after Arsenal defeat appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea BATTLE Liverpool transfer for Huijsen amid Konate uncertainty
arts.sum: Liverpool have emerged as one of the frontrunners to sign Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen this summer but their interest could have serious implications on the future of Ibrahima Konate, according to David Ornstein. Arsenal and Chelsea BATTLE Liverpool transfer for Huijsen amid Konate uncertainty – David Ornstein
